properties.purpose: Real-time detection and prevention of fraudulent transactions

properties.what_it_measures: Processing time per transaction
Percentage of fraudulent transactions successfully identified
Rate of legitimate transactions incorrectly flagged as fraud
Total monetary value of fraudulent activity stopped monthly

properties.rule_statement: Flag transactions exceeding £5,000
Flag transactions occurring in a different country within 2 hours of previous transaction
Flag more than 5 transactions within a 1-hour window
Flag transfers to new beneficiaries combined with large amounts
Flag high-value transactions where the physical card is not presented
Automatically approve transactions flagged as low risk
Require One-Time Password verification for medium risk alerts
Block transaction, notify customer, and escalate to Financial Crime team for high risk alerts

properties.purpose: Process customer payments and inter-bank settlements

properties.context: Quality control threshold for payment processing

properties.rule_statement: FPS transactions are capped at a maximum value of £1M
BACS batch submissions must be completed by 20:00 GMT each day
CHAPS transactions are processed in real-time only during designated operating hours
Hot data retained for 3 months with real-time updates; warm data for 1-3 years with nightly batch; cold data archived to S3 after 3+ years

properties.what_it_measures: Maximum allowed interval between automatic credential rotations

properties.purpose: Managed DDoS protection for network infrastructure
Automated threat detection and intrusion monitoring

properties.rule_statement: Ingress traffic restricted to Port 443 (HTTPS) for public APIs; branch systems require VPN-only access; admin access limited to a restricted IP whitelist.
AWS Shield must be enabled for managed DDoS protection; CloudFlare may be deployed as an optional supplementary layer when required.
AWS GuardDuty must be active for continuous threat detection; log analysis and automated alerting are required upon suspicious activity.

properties.context: Disaster Recovery & Business Continuity

properties.purpose: Store and manage Docker container images for applications
Maintain real-time database replica for failover and disaster recovery

properties.what_it_measures: Duration daily encrypted database backups are retained in S3
properties.context: Ensures sufficient recovery points for recent data loss or corruption events

properties.what_it_measures: Duration weekly database backups are retained in cold storage
properties.context: Ensures long-term data preservation and archival compliance

properties.rule_statement: Databases must use continuous real-time replication to a standby target, daily encrypted backups retained for 30 days, and weekly cold storage backups retained for 1 year.
properties.consequence: Inability to recover data or meet regulatory compliance requirements

properties.rule_statement: Application source code must be stored in GitHub, Docker images in AWS ECR, and all configurations maintained in version control.
properties.consequence: Loss of deployable artifacts and inability to reproduce environments or roll back changes

properties.what_it_measures: How often disaster recovery tests are conducted

properties.rule_statement: Tests must be conducted quarterly and cover database restoration, application failover, network failure simulation, and data loss scenarios.

properties.rule_statement: Comprehensive data protection framework governing privacy, subject rights, and breach reporting.

name: Customer Communication and Fair Treatment Requirement

properties.rule_statement: Ensures all customer communications adhere to fair treatment standards.

name: System Reliability and Business Continuity Requirement

properties.rule_statement: Maintains system reliability and ensures uninterrupted business operations during disruptions.
Enforces strict data security and privacy controls across all systems.
Monitors capital levels to ensure financial stability and regulatory compliance.
Ensures the organization can withstand, adapt to, and recover from operational disruptions.
Implements cyber security measures as a core component of operational resilience.
Guarantees data subject rights including access and deletion upon request.
Integrates data protection measures into the design and architecture of systems from inception.
Mandates timely notification of data breaches to relevant authorities.

properties.what_it_measures: Maximum allowable time to report a data breach after discovery
properties.context: Enforced under GDPR breach notification requirement

properties.rule_statement: Conduct a post-incident review following incident resolution
Execute a defined escalation procedure for incidents
